name: Bright Data Agent Browser
description: Enterprise-grade browser automation API for AI agents. Provides hosted, scalable browser infrastructure with built-in stealth, CAPTCHA solving, proxy rotation, and JavaScript rendering. Supports Puppeteer, Playwright, and Selenium for programmatic control.
pricing: Pay-as-you-go at $8/GB or included GB plans ($5-7/GB, 71-399GB/month)
notes: Enterprise solution for large-scale browser automation. Handles infrastructure, fingerprinting, and CAPTCHA challenges automatically. Recommended for production agent deployment at scale. First deposit matched dollar-for-dollar up to $500.
